title: Merge the completed tenant-generic Power Platform auth and team-status workflow branch into development
execution_plan_ref: Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md § Initiative: M365 Power Platform and Team Status Merge to Development
objective: Merge the completed Power Platform executor-auth remediation and weekly team-status workflow enablement into development through one bounded, validated merge.

decision_rule.merge_scoped: MergeSurface bounded to source diff plus merge package and trackers
decision_rule.merge_validated: PyCompileGreen AND VerifiersGreen AND FocusedPytestGreen AND PreCommitGreen AND DiffCheckGreen
decision_rule.go: MergeSourceReady AND MergeTargetReady AND MergeScoped AND MergeValidated

requirements.description: Verify source and target branch readiness before mutating development.
Keep the merge bounded to development only.
Merge the governed source branch via an explicit merge commit and bounded conflict resolution.
Re-run the final bounded validation slice on merged development.
Synchronize trackers and package status truthfully.
Push development only after green validation and stop before further promotion.
